title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 14.  LICENSING SPECIALIZED PROVIDERS

§1401.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the "Specialized Provider Licensing Act."

Acts 1985, No. 286, §1; Acts 2014, No. 868, §5, eff. Oct. 1, 2014.

CHAPTER 14.  LICENSING SPECIALIZED PROVIDERS
§1401.  Short title
This Chapter may be cited as the "Specialized Provider Licensing Act."
Acts 1985, No. 286, §1; Acts 2014, No. 868, §5, eff. Oct. 1, 2014.
